meaning: n.斐济群岛人,斐济群岛语,斐济族adj.斐济的,斐济人的,斐济语的
examples: The Fijian dollar (currency code FJD) is the currency of Fiji.
Iloilovatu said that the Fijian people hold friendly feelings towards China.
I asked a South Pacific travel specialist to recommend a resort that would give us a taste of real Fijian life.
He was an outstanding batsman who amassed the highest score in Fijian cricket - 246.
Is Ilikena Lasarusa Talebula ... maineiiliken...amain...avalen...iveivak...abulaimaina...kulalakebalau (the Fijian "Botham"), the cricketer with the longest name?
